summary: Verified CSV upload normalization (DD/MM/YYYY storage), missing-column 400 error, per-row error messages, and EPOS Accountancy brand across login/admin/client shells. All scenarios pass.
passed: Missing Date column -> HTTP 400 detail: 'CSV is missing required column(s): Date. Your file must have a header row with: Description, Date, Amount.'
Unparseable date -> HTTP 200, rows_imported:0, errors:["Row 2: Date 'not-a-date' is not a recognised format (expected DD/MM/YYYY)"]
Date variants normalised (2025-12-01, 01-12-2025, 01/12/2025) -> all stored as '01/12/2025' via GET /api/client/items
GET /api/client/items returns date field formatted as DD/MM/YYYY
Login page renders EPOS Accountancy brand + SVG mark; data-testid login-email-input/login-password-input/login-submit-btn present and functional
Admin login navigates to /admin and data-testid admin-shell visible; sidebar shows 'EPOS Accountancy / Practice Admin'
Client login navigates to /portal; data-testid client-shell and brand-link present; brand text 'EPOS Accountancy · Portal'
notes: Created test client csvtest1782713463@example.com (id 6a420c7815fac58ce2da55c3) for CSV upload + client-items verification. brand-link data-testid only exists on client-shell (ClientLayout.jsx); login and admin pages render brand without that specific testid but display 'EPOS Accountancy' text + SVG.
